Basic Training.
No shortcuts.

A reference guide for RACP Basic Training — covering entry requirements, learning programs, assessment standards, and progression criteria for trainees and supervisors in Australia and Aotearoa New Zealand.

36
months FTE clinical experience required
49
competencies across 10 domains
8
Entrustable Professional Activities
3
training phases to complete

Training Phases

Foundation

Entry point of training. Submit your application by 28 Feb or 31 Aug.

Consolidation

Ongoing rotations and work-based assessments. 12 learning captures + 12 observation captures per phase.

Completion

Written Examination (early) and Clinical Examination (mid-phase). Final phase before fellowship.
